_comment: EXAMPLE state/quota-health.json showing BOTH concerns the live file carries: the cost/quota rollup (ticket #273, written by scripts/quota-watch.sh --write) AND an ACTIVE codex auto-fallback (ticket #97, written by scripts/set-backend-fallback.sh). The live file is written on-demand by either writer (JSON merge), read by Commander preflight, the quota_health status block, and scripts/select-worker-backend.sh. Every field is optional: an absent file, an empty {}, a cost-only file, or a fallback-only file all validate, and a file with none of the backend fields routes safely to the Claude backend. Validated by state/schemas/quota-health.schema.json. Specs: docs/specs/2026-06-07-quota-watch-cost-visibility.md (#273), docs/specs/2026-06-01-codex-auto-fallback.md (#97).
